text:
O0110B1A Treatment: Radiation (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received radiation days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
961 RDTN_14_CD RDTN_14_CD O0110B1B Treatment: Radiation (14 days) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received radiation while a resident of the facility and within the last 14 days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
962 RDTN_DSCHRG_CD
